description: CompositionRoyal blue shorts made of 100% cotton, has a pleated front, two insert pockets on the front, one pocket at the back and a zipper flyFittingComfortWash careWash separately in water below 40 degreesDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoCut your Fridays short and jump into the weekend with these electric blue shorts from adidas. A broad waistband that sits snug round your waist and fabric that is pure cotton promises great, comfy company when you want to go high on casual style. Pair it with a racer back T-shirt and slides for that perfectly careless look.Model statisticsThe model wears shorts of length 39”Height-5.8", Waist-26"
